3141260.name: Fantasy Grounds - Rifts(R) for Savage World Terror on the Dark Frontier Box Set
3141260.description:
Rifts(R) for Savage World Terror on the Dark Frontier Box Set

The first EVER campaign boxed set for Rifts(R) is now at your fingertips! The boxed set includes:
  • Campaign Book (adapted from the 90-page softcover)
  • Creature Manual (adapted from the 26-page softcover)
  • Player's Handbook (adapted from the 18-page softcover +PDF)
  • Region Guide (adapted from the 86-page softcover + PDF)
Tokens and NPC adapted from the Figure Flats and Pawns PDFs (37+ unique images) Map Pack (4 battle maps: Frontier Town, Ziggurat, Simvan Camp, Station 13 Alpha) The Terror on the Dark Frontier Campaign Book contains the plot points that make up the campaign along with a number of additional Savage Tales. You can run these standalone stories whenever you choose to add diversions to break up the campaign. Creature Manual The Terror on the Dark Frontier Creature Manual collects in one convenient reference the most common denizens your Legionnaires will encounter, along with some important allies to aid them in their adventures. Player's Handbook The Terror on the Dark Frontier Player's Book offers a simple introduction to your Legionnaires to explain the important people and places they are about to discover, setting the scene for them to explore the area and discover the secrets of the Dark Frontier. Region Guide The Terror on the Dark Frontier Region Guide provides a detailed background to the region in which this epic tale is set. Here you'll find a comprehensive overview of the area in which the campaign takes place. Pawns & Figure Flats Crawling out of the Dark Frontier, these Tokens and NPC adapted from the Figure Flats and Pawns PDFs (37+ unique images) are implemented Tokens and 2.5D Assets inside Fantasy Grounds Map Pack A set of four large, 30 x 24 maps marked with a light one-inch grid, perfect for use with Savage Worlds pawns. Includes a Frontier Town, Ziggurat, Simvan Camp, and Station 13 Alpha. Gear Cards Ten gear cards round out the boxed set, with five unique items to help the legionnaires defeat their foes and survive the Dark Frontier.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joe Collins[/b]
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
